title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the photographs and answer the questions.

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what pressures healthcare workers face and what qualities are essential for working in the medical field.

images.label: A
images.description: A surgeon and their team in full protective gear performing a complex operation in a brightly lit theatre, all focused with precise movements

images.label: B
images.description: A nurse comforting an elderly patient in a hospital ward, holding their hand and speaking gently while the patient looks relieved

images.label: C
images.description: An exhausted doctor sitting in a hospital corridor during a break, rubbing their eyes with a coffee cup in hand, colleagues rushing past in the background

followUp.question: What do you think are the greatest pressures faced by healthcare workers today, and how can society better support them?

tasks.instructions: Compare two of the pictures, and say what might attract people to alternative medicine and what the potential risks and benefits might be.

images.label: D
images.description: A therapist performing acupuncture on a relaxed patient lying face-down on a treatment table in a calm, softly lit clinic

images.label: E
images.description: A herbalist arranging rows of dried plant remedies and tinctures in a wooden cabinet, a customer looking on with curiosity

images.label: F
images.description: A meditation and mindfulness session in a tranquil studio, participants seated in a circle with eyes closed, guided by an instructor

followUp.question: Do you think alternative medicine can be a valuable complement to conventional healthcare, or should people rely solely on evidence-based medicine?
